assessmentObjectives.description: Understand and respond to spoken language
Understand and respond to written language
Interact and communicate effectively in speech

topics.name: Describing Yourself and Others
topics.description: Name, age, personality, appearance; adjectives agreement; physical and character descriptions

topics.name: Family and Friends
topics.description: Family members, relationships, getting on with others; possessive adjectives; reflexive verbs

topics.name: Marriage and Partnerships
topics.description: Relationships, marriage, civil partnerships; opinions on relationships; future tense plans

topics.name: Food, Diet and Healthy Eating
topics.description: Meals, food vocabulary, healthy eating; partitive articles; opinions on diet and lifestyle

topics.name: Sport and Exercise
topics.description: Sports, fitness, exercise routines; faire de + sport; jouer à + sport; advantages of sport

topics.name: Health, Illness and Wellbeing
topics.description: Parts of the body, illnesses, at the doctor/pharmacy; avoir mal à; health advice

topics.name: Smoking, Drugs and Alcohol
topics.description: Dangers of smoking, drugs and alcohol; opinions; il faut / il ne faut pas; healthy choices

topics.name: School Life and Subjects
topics.description: School subjects, timetable, opinions on subjects; the French school system; comparisons

topics.name: School Rules and Uniform
topics.description: School rules, uniform, facilities; il faut / on doit / interdiction; expressing obligation

topics.name: Future Plans and Careers
topics.description: Jobs, careers, further study; future plans; conditional tense (je voudrais); applications

topics.name: Hobbies and Interests
topics.description: Leisure activities, reading, music, films; hobbies in different tenses; opinions and reasons

topics.name: Technology in Everyday Life
topics.description: Social media, internet, smartphones; advantages and dangers; opinions on technology use

topics.name: Going Out and Entertainment
topics.description: Cinema, concerts, restaurants; inviting friends; arranging to go out; accepting and declining

topics.name: French Traditions and Festivals
topics.description: Bastille Day, Noël, Pâques, Chandeleur; French cultural traditions; celebrations in France

topics.name: Francophone Culture
topics.description: Culture in French-speaking countries; food, music, art; la Francophonie; cultural diversity

topics.name: Food and Drink Culture
topics.description: French cuisine, meals, regional specialities; at the café/restaurant; ordering food; typical dishes

topics.name: Famous French-Speaking People
topics.description: Famous francophone figures; sport, music, film stars; describing achievements; role models

topics.name: The Influence of Celebrities
topics.description: Impact of celebrity culture; social media influencers; positive and negative influences; opinions

topics.name: Holidays and Travel
topics.description: Holiday destinations, travel by train/plane/car; accommodation; the perfect tense for past holidays

topics.name: Places of Interest in France
topics.description: Paris, regions of France, tourist attractions; describing towns; ce qui/ce que; visiting France

topics.name: At the Hotel and Tourist Information
topics.description: Booking accommodation, asking for information, dealing with problems; hotel vocabulary; role-plays

topics.name: Television, Film and Music
topics.description: TV programmes, films, music genres; opinions and justifications; comparing media; French media

topics.name: The Internet and Social Media
topics.description: Online activities, social networks, cyberbullying; advantages and risks; internet safety

strands.name: Theme 3.3: The Environment and Where People Live

topics.name: Your Local Area
topics.description: Describing your town/region; what there is to do; facilities; il y a / il n'y a pas de; advantages and disadvantages

topics.name: Environmental Problems and Solutions
topics.description: Pollution, recycling, climate change; environmental vocabulary; il faut + infinitive; solutions

topics.name: Charity and Voluntary Work
topics.description: Volunteering, helping others, charity organisations; imperfect tense; community projects

topics.name: Tenses: Present, Perfect and Imperfect
topics.description: Forming and using the present, perfect (passé composé) and imperfect tenses; when to use each

topics.name: Tenses: Future and Conditional
topics.description: The near future (aller + infinitive), simple future and conditional (je voudrais); expressing plans and wishes

topics.name: Articles, Adjectives and Agreement
topics.description: Definite, indefinite and partitive articles; adjective agreement (gender and number); position of adjectives

topics.name: Pronouns and Negation
topics.description: Subject, object and reflexive pronouns; y and en; negation (ne...pas, ne...jamais, ne...rien, ne...plus)

topics.name: Prepositions and Conjunctions
topics.description: Key prepositions (à, de, en, dans); conjunctions (mais, parce que, cependant, donc); connecting ideas

topics.name: Question Forms and Modal Verbs
topics.description: Forming questions (three methods); modal verbs (pouvoir, devoir, vouloir, savoir); expressing ability and obligation
